prompt_text: Gao Lingning, a tall elegant young Chinese noblewoman in historical hanfu, pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura, stands in medium shot at the left third of the frame facing right toward Lu Shuyi; her shoulders and neck are held rigid, lips pressed thin, gaze controlled yet tense, enduring a public confession without speaking. A blurred pale pink sleeve of Lu Shuyi occupies the right foreground as a soft presence anchor; behind Gao Lingning, an ancient banquet hall with defocused wooden screens and drifting noble guests creates the feeling of being watched yet unaided. Side-back light gently traces the faint scar on her neck, with low-saturation gray-blue, old wood brown, and amber candlelight clashing subtly against restrained cool skin tones. cinematic realism, limited subjective perspective, Song dynasty aesthetics, shallow depth of field, emotional pressure, highly detailed costume texture, refined film still

prompt_text: Lu Shuyi, a frail young noblewoman in ancient Chinese attire, pale skin, watery downturned almond eyes, slim delicate figure, black hair in an elegant traditional updo, light pink silk hanfu with gauze layers, fragile yet calculating expression, appears in a medium close-up centered slightly right, looking off-frame left toward Gao Lingning; her face is deathly pale, brows lowered at first, then she forces herself to raise her eyes, lips drained of color, posture slightly inward but held with fragile dignity as she begins to confess. A small dark shoulder line of Gao Lingning presses into the left foreground edge; behind Lu Shuyi stand a wooden pillar and one warm golden banquet lantern in a noble interior. The palette stays low-saturation with gray-blue shadows, old wood brown, and amber lamp glow against her cold white complexion. cinematic realism, restrained emotional attack, Song dynasty aesthetic, intimate lensing, subtle film grain, highly detailed silk and skin texture

prompt_text: Over-the-shoulder medium shot of Gao Lingning in the left foreground, seen from behind with the back of her head and shoulder occupying the frame edge, while Lu Shuyi, a frail young noblewoman in ancient Chinese attire, pale skin, watery downturned almond eyes, slim delicate figure, black hair in an elegant traditional updo, light pink silk hanfu with gauze layers, fragile yet calculating expression, stands in sharp focus at mid-right; Lu Shuyi draws inward at the shoulders yet forces herself to speak the ugliest truth, her expression fragile, resolved, and near collapse. In the deep corridor background, Shen Ci appears as a blurred isolated figure cut by a doorway frame, a tall aristocratic young man from ancient China, cold and elegant, sharp long eyes, pale skin, high nose bridge, thin lips, black hair in a neat topknot with jade crown, wearing dark blue and black embroidered hanfu, restrained noble aura, subtle obsession and sorrow in his expression, reduced to a distant vertical silhouette. The noble residence corridor uses old wood brown, gray-blue shadows, muted candle amber, and narrow framing lines from doors and architecture to create ritual restraint and approaching revelation. cinematic realism, limited subjective perspective rooted in Gao Lingning, Song dynasty aesthetics, layered depth, slow dolly feeling, highly detailed costume and architectural texture
